raw_text: The Terrapack software, from ASTER TEC / ASTER S.p.A., with the indicated components and versions has a file upload vulnerability that may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code. Vulnerable components include Terrapack TkWebCoreNG:: 1.0.20200914, Terrapack TKServerCGI 2.5.4.150, and Terrapack TpkWebGIS Client 1.0.0.
